feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to generate your SAP Datasphere documentation automatically
entry.content:
As in all projects, what is consuming and which is most often botched by consultants is the documentation.
And for good reason, happy to do development, we are often less happy in the newsroom.
The search for an automatic solution is often a hope rarely encountered

It is with this in mind that I share with you the premises of my documentation solution for SAP Datasphere Based on a model created in SAP Datasphere and a story in SAC, here is the result obtained in real time

 

Of course, there are many possibilities to extend the model to answer any question.

Features:
- Information about artifacts, whether it's a model, a view, a table
- Full lineage from an analytical model
- List of fields
- List of source tables on which the analytical model depends

Overview of the current model:
Based on the technical tables of the DB HANA, you can find an overview of the analytical model used to generate the documentation

 

Still to do:
- find the formulas,
- the information in the Business Purpose fields and other labels

entry.title: SAP Datasphere hierarchy with directory error
entry.content:
I followed the blog article here:
Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP D... - SAP Community

but I get the error message:

"All leaf elements must be used as part of the association between dimension and hierarchy"

when I try to deploy the association to the hierarchy in the dimension.
Does anyone have a clue what might be the problem?

Help very appreciated

entry.title: Date and others atribute association
entry.content:
Hello team,

I'm currently testing the SAP Datasphere trial and building a test model with the attributes "Year" (Date), "Organica," "FF," and "Economica." However, when I preview the data, the Year appears merged with the other attributes.

Each attribute has its own key, and the Year is set as the primary key. However, as shown in the screenshot, the information appears concatenated. Is there a way to separate the Year from the other attributes without using code for now? If code is required, what would be the best approach?

Thanks for your time!

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Inquiry on Seamless Planning Activation and HANA Cloud Verification in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I would like to ask if the seamless planning functionality is currently active or if it is planned for a future release. I'm trying to utilize it, but I don't see the option to select the "Data Storage Location" when creating a new model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Additionally, I am unsure if my SAC system is running on HANA Cloud, which might be part of the issue. Could you advise how I can confirm whether my SAC system is running on HANA Cloud?

Please let me know if seamless planning is active for any tenants or if this feature will be released at a later date.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Missing ODP_BW, ODP_SAPI, and SLT in Replication Flow (SAP S/4HANA to SAP Datasphere)
entry.content:
Dear experts I am setting up a Replication Flow from SAP S/4HANA to SAP Datasphere. In my previous system, I could see multiple extraction options like:
CDS_EXTRACTION
ODP_BW
ODP_SAPI
SLT

However, in my current system, only CDS Views is available, and the other options are missing.

Priyanka

entry.title: Connection between SAP Datasphere and Azure Storage Account by using SAP Private Link Service
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have been following this tutorial for using the SAP Private Link Service to set up a private connection between SAP Datasphere and an Azure Storage Account. We are using replication flows in SAP Datasphere to write data from SAP S/4HANA to an Azure Storage Account

The Private Link Service has been set up on BTP, but now that I need to bind the service to SAP Datasphere, I'm starting to doubt that this will work.

Can anyone guide or advice me on how to do this?

Is it even possible to use the SAP private Link Service with SAP Datasphere?

Thanks!


Kind Regards,

Joachim

entry.title: Datasphere - Replication Flow
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to replicate around 300 ECC tables with (inital+delta) loads using replication flow.

Based on your implementation experience, could you please assist me?

What would be a good approach?

How many maximum tables should I add for one replication flow? OR Do I have to create a separate RF for each table? OR Maybe I should group them together based on module and function, like SD, MM, Masterdata, PM, etc. OR Try something else than RF.

Regards,

entry.title: Use a Datasphere View in a SAP CAP service over an HDI container - View not exposed for consumption
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to interact with a Datasphere View from a SAP CAP service. I am following the mission as follows:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-build-apps-data-entry

The issue is when I am trying to deploy the SAP CAP service (https://github.com/SAP-samples/datasphere-build-apps-data-entry/tree/main/documentation/develop/deploy-cap-application) as I am getting the error as follows:

error: "SAC$TEC"."HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS": line 43 col 9 (at pos 2079): Unsupported Feature: Cannot grant the requested privilege, because SAC.ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS is not exposed for consumption)

This is at high level what we have:

A view created in Datasphere which is exposed for consumption.

 

A technical user with privileges to read and write.

A in BTP a User Provided Service named "datasphere-sac-space-ups" with the details of the above user:

 

{
    "password": "XXXXXXXXX",
    "procedure": "HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS",
    "procedure_schema": "SAC$TEC",
    "schema": "SAC",
    "tags": [
        "hana"
    ],
    "type": "procedure",
    "user": "SAC#SAC_POC"
}

 

.hdbgrants as follows:

{
	"datasphere-sac-space-ups": {
		"object_owner": {
			"roles": [],
			"container_roles": [],
			"object_privileges": [
                {
				  "type": "VIEW",
				  "name": "ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS",
				  "privileges_with_grant_option": [
				    "SELECT","READ","WRITE"
				  ]
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

.hdsynonym

{
  "SAP_POC": {
    "target": {
        "schema": "SAC",        
        "object": "ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS"
    }
  }
}

But unfortunately, we are getting the error already mentioned when deploying the CAP application.

error: "SAC$TEC"."HDI_GRANTOR_FOR_CUPS": line 43 col 9 (at pos 2079): Unsupported Feature: Cannot grant the requested privilege, because SAC.ZGV_SO_ICOMMNETS is not exposed for consumption)

Any ideas about what may be happening?

Thanks in advance!

C.

entry.title: Can Rapid FP&A be used with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise, and how to configure Standard CDS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on implementing Rapid FP&A in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) with S/4HANA 2022 On-Premise. The documentation I’ve come across primarily mentions SAP S/4HANA Public & Private Cloud Editions, but I haven’t found clear guidance for S/4HANA On-Premise.

My Key Questions:
Can we use the Rapid FP&A Suite with the 2022 On-Premise version of S/4HANA?
The documentation and resources mention connectivity primarily for cloud editions, and I would like confirmation on whether the suite is compatible with on-premise.
Steps to Configure Standard CDS Views for On-Premise:
I am trying to configure the Standard CDS (for example, GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery found in the SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan model) in our on-premise S/4HANA environment.
We are facing issues, such as permissions errors and inability to refresh queries, which seem to be cloud-related setups. However, we are on S/4HANA On-Premise 2022.

I've looked for existing Standard CDS views related to FP&A in our on-premise system, but I haven't found relevant resources specific to on-premise.
Encountered a permission issue with GLAccountBalanceFlowQuery during refresh attempts (attached error).


Can the community help clarify whether the Rapid FP&A suite can be used with S/4HANA On-Premise?
If so, could you guide me through the steps required to configure the relevant Standard CDS views (or build custom ones) for FP&A models on-premise?
Any detailed steps, documentation, or guidance would be highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Updating a source object (CDS)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm wondering if it is possible to update a source object in a replication flow.

Currently I have a replication flow that has 1 object with 228 columns. I've extended the CDS view with 1 field so now I have 229 columns in the CDS view. However, the replication flow doesn't see this change. The only solution I have found is to add the same object again, but that means I have to manually check the projection (Mappings and filters) and all the RF settings.

See the attached screenshot as a reference. The first row is the original replication flow, the seconds row is the same object added for the second time, now displaying the correct amount of 229 columns.

entry.title: Datasphere tenant not reachable
entry.content:
Hello All,

we are working on several customer in EU10 datasphere tenants.

in over 80% of the tenant we try to access, we receive this error message after correct authentication

 

Roles are Ok (standard role DW Administrator + DW Scoped Space Administrator).

How can I see if there are some disruption of services?

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Selection of the Exchange Rate in a standard variable
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a standard variable that takes a variable filled by a dynamic default within a lookup entity to the Exchange Rate table, specifically a currency exchange column called Exchange Rate type.

However, when I view the preview of the Analytical Model (AM), it does not allow me to navigate within the column to select the desired value, as it does for other filters like Company Currency.

Is it possible to solve this issue without adding the Exchange Rate table to the AM, so using the Standard Variable?

Thenks

entry.title: Error trying to enter the Sap datasphere free trail
entry.content:
I'm trying to access the free trail of sap datasphere but when I log on, after a few seconds it appears that the session has ended and I can't work with SAP Datasphere.After entering the free trail of SAP Datasphere, I got an indication that it is undergoing an update.
Can you explain what it is and how long it lasts?

 

And can you tell me if, because I'm doing a master's thesis, I can ask to have more than 30 days free use of sap datasphere?

entry.title: Replication flow Import Export
entry.content:
While moving the replication flow from Dev to QA tenant of datasphere, how will the replication flow be mapped to the source connection with the QA tenant, do i need to again re point the replication flow after impor to the source connection of that particular tenant, i had to face the issue while importing the replication flow from one space to another in the same tenant, however how will it behave while moving it from dev to QA to Prod where the access is very limited, will i need to repoint the replication flow to the source connections of those tenants  

 

Please help

entry.title: SAP Datasphere and SAP Information Steward Connectivity
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently migrating to SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud. We have currently BO, Data Services and Information Steward solutions deployed.

We wanted to know how we can integrate SAP Information Steward with SAP Datasphere?.  What are the ways to connect IS to Datasphere?

Regards,

Nachiket

entry.title: Join in DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi team, 

I have two excel files that have This columns:

Excel1:

Excel 2:

I want to join this data into a table to display it in SAC, but when I perform the join, no data appears.

 

 

The data itself is similar but also different at the same time, as it serves different purposes.

Thanks,

Ganjos

entry.title: Filter on a Date Field, defaulted with the current date
entry.content:
Hello expert. 

I have a very simple and common request, by the Client. Inside a Datasphere Analytical Model, I have to create a prompt to enable users to apply an optional filter on a Date Field, in such a way that the default value of this filter is the current date.

In spite of the fact that the request is quite common and apparently easy, I cannot find the way to satisfy this request, since the only default values that I can choose for a variable filter are constant (and not dynamic as in my case). The only alternative that I can think is to use an Input Parameter applied on the FACT table underlying the Analytical Model, defaulting it on a View providing the current date in its output. Is it really needed such a complication to do a very simple and common task?

Can you help me?

Thanks

Andrea

entry.title: Missing descriptions in Text
entry.content:
Hello Expert.

I have created a Text table, using a Data Flow importing a standard Text CDS. No logic at all has been added: the Data Flow reads the Text CDS and with a 1:1 mapping, save data into a Text Table (Texts are language dependant). Nevertheless, when I check data, the descriptions do not appear: Datasphere is not able to retrieve them (I am expecting to see the descriptions in the connection language). Investigating a lot, I found the reason of this issue: the language code, which is a one digit code coming from the CDS (as: E, I...) is not converted in the two digit code required by Datasphere (as: EN, IT..). I am pretty sure of this, since, if I do this conversion through a custom formula, then everything works perfectly and I can see the descriptions, filtered on the connection language. According to your official documentations, if I am not wrong, this conversion should be done automatically by Datasphere (as BW, for example, does).

Is there something wrong in what I am doing? Do I really need a custom formula to do this conversion, in all the Text tables (tens and tens) that I need to bring from S4 into Datasphere? I cannot believe this.

Can you help me?

Thanks

Andrea

entry.title: Export S4 hana data as a file to GCS using datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using SAP DATA SPHERE Can we transfer file to GCS bucket?Kindly suggest.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Trial Account error
entry.content:
Hello together,


my SAP Datasphere trial account doesnt work, because after the login I always get logged out from the system. Can anybody help me here?

Thank you very much!
